evals.prompt: Recommend the next slice for this project and draft the spec for it.
evals.expected_output: A reviewer second opinion runs before the spec is presented, via a scratch-file prompt to the resolved reviewer model, capped at three debate rounds.

assertions.text: Gets a second opinion from the resolved reviewer model before presenting the spec to the user
Writes the review prompt to a scratch file and invokes with -p "$(cat file)" rather than inline quoting
Caps debate at three rounds and presents unresolved disagreement to the user as the decision
Does not start implementation before user approval

evals.prompt: /blaze fable - plan and implement the retry logic fix.
evals.expected_output: The reviewer model resolves to claude-fable-5 from the invocation argument.

assertions.text: Resolves the reviewer model to claude-fable-5 from the invocation argument and uses it for all review gates

evals.prompt: The plan is approved, go ahead and implement it.
evals.expected_output: Implementation on a feature branch, slice defined before editing, only approved scope, verification with exact commands reported.

assertions.text: Creates or confirms a feature branch before editing
Defines the slice (behavior, files, checks, docs, out-of-scope) before editing
Reports exact verification commands and their results, not confidence statements

evals.prompt: Implementation looks done to me. Review it and ship the PR.
evals.expected_output: Pre-PR reviewer inspection of the full diff, then the validation tail; never a manual push to main; install of missing tooling only with consent.

assertions.text: Runs the pre-PR reviewer gate on the diff before any PR activity
Never pushes to main manually; delivery goes through the validated PR
If the no-mistakes CLI is missing, asks the user before running any install script and falls back to manual verification plus user-approved PR on decline

evals.prompt: The PR was merged, wrap up.
evals.expected_output: Post-merge cleanup: fast-forward main, delete local and remote feature branches, confirm validation outcome.

assertions.text: Fast-forwards main and deletes the local and remote feature branches

evals.prompt: Users report the export button silently fails on files over 10MB. Fix this bug with the full workflow.
evals.expected_output: The bug is reproduced end to end before any fix, the diagnosis (not a spec) goes through the reviewer gate, and the reproduction becomes a regression test in the acceptance criteria.

assertions.text: Produces a failing end-to-end reproduction before proposing or implementing any fix
The reviewer gate evaluates the root-cause diagnosis with the reproduction as evidence, asking whether the fix patches a symptom
Acceptance criteria include the reproduction passing and graduating into the test suite as a regression test
Keeps the fix minimal and parks nearby refactors as follow-ups

evals.prompt: You are worker 3 dispatched by the swarm coordinator; implement your assigned slice in worktree ../repo-auth on branch slice/auth.
evals.expected_output: blaze does not engage; the swarm-worker skill governs dispatched worker threads.

assertions.text: Does not apply blaze's PR and review-gate workflow inside a dispatched worker thread
